zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth De Gournai Beverstone於1275年6月5日出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東時，她的父親John de Gournai Lord of Beverston28歲，母親Lady Olivia Lovel61歲。她於1291年與Sir John William Ap Adam結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1311年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特查爾頓 亞當享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth De Gournai Beverstone于1275年6月5日出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東时，她的父亲John de Gournai Lord of Beverston28岁，母亲Lady Olivia Lovel61岁。她于1291年与Sir John William Ap Adam结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1311年在英国英格兰薩默塞特查爾頓 亞當享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth De Gournai Beverstone was born on 5 June 1275, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Gournai Lord of Beverston, was 28 and her mother, Lady Olivia Lovel, was 61. She married Sir John William Ap Adam in 1291. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1311, in Charlton Adam, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

Elle a épousé Sir John William Ap Adam en 1291. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1311, à Charlton Adam, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth De Gournai Beverstoneが1275年6月5日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンで生まれた時，父John de Gournai Lord of Beverstonは28歳，母Lady Olivia Lovelは61歳であった。1291年にSir John William Ap Adamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1311年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトチャールトン アダムで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth De Gournai Beverstone(이)가 1275년 6월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Gournai Lord of Beverston(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Olivia Lovel(은)는 61세였다. 그녀는 1291년 Sir John William Ap Adam(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1311년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 찰턴 애다에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth De Gournai Beverstone родилась 5 июня 1275 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Gournai Lord of Beverston было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Olivia Lovel, 61. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John William Ap Adam в 1291 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1311 г. в местности чарлтон адам, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.
